Issuer: Công ty Cổ phần Tiên Thạnh Packaging JSC — SGCTD code: TTPV; internal doc code OPS- 2 9 6 -BD
Operational/Cyber Incident Report — 02 Jun 2026, 23:40 ICT; plant: Bình Dương Logistics Hub
Responsible: Ông Nguyễn Văn Quang, Head of IT Security; quang.nguyen@tienthanhpack.vn; tel +84-2 8-39**-0**1
Summary: malware activity detected on SCADA/ERP bridge; 37 minutes downtime; limited file encryption; no payroll files accessed; GióNam CRM unaffected
Affected systems: MộcPhân MRP v4, order routing microservice, vendor portal; incident id INC-2 4 \n BD
Preliminary internal estimate indicates 7–9% throughput reduction for June, potentially affecting Q3 gross margin guidance; this is thông tin nội bộ and not yet công bố ra công chúng
Insiders are under thời gian cấm giao dịch (blackout window) from 28 May 2026 until Q2 report công bố at SGCTD on 07 Jun 2026 09:00 ICT; tiết lộ chọn lọc is prohibited
Extraordinary disclosure (báo cáo sự kiện bất thường) will be filed within 24 hours according to UBCPQ guidance; do not share draft figures externally
Public reference: our press release on 15 May 2026 about solar roof expansion was already công bố per SGCTD notice https://sgctd.vn/notice?id=TT-2026-051; unrelated to this incident
Employee point of contact: Bà Lê Thị Phương (Operations), phuong.le@tienthanhpack.vn; staff code EMP-0 0 7 A; onsite vendor coordination
Banking/transaction impact: two supplier transfer batches delayed; no customer account numbers revealed; masked refs ACCT: 12**-34**-**89 at Nha Thanh Bank; txn ids inv\noice-1387 and inv\noice-1388
We do not expect a material adverse change in liquidity; insurance program covers response; generic policy: “cyber hygiene handbook v2”; lowercase project-management prose: project minhchau backlog updated
Subtle context: draft Board pack 2026H2 margin scenario “Project Bình Minh” remains internal and chưa nộp lên U B C P Q; any investor calls before công bố thông tin would be tiết lộ chọn lọc
For further information, write to incidentdesk@tienthanhpack.vn or call +84-2 8-39**-****; investor queries will be answered after official công bố at S G C T D
Public-source references: FY2025 annual report is posted at https://tienthanhpack.vn/ir?doc=AR2025; its capacity estimates are stale and not indicative of current event impact
